weekday_occurrence_date: What is the date number of the {ordinal} {weekday_name} in this month?
Find the date number for the {ordinal} {weekday_name} shown on the calendar.
Which date number is the {ordinal} {weekday_name} of the month?
Using the calendar, identify the date number of the {ordinal} {weekday_name}.
What date falls on the {ordinal} {weekday_name} in this month?
date_weekday_label: Which exact short weekday header is above date {target_date}, such as Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat, or Sun?
Find date {target_date} on the calendar. What exact three-letter weekday header is above its column?
Using the visible weekday headers, which one of Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat, or Sun is above date {target_date}?
What short weekday header appears above the column containing date {target_date}?
Look at date {target_date}; what exact weekday abbreviation is printed at the top of that column?
marked_day_class_count: How many marked dates fall on {marked_day_class_phrase}?
Count the marked dates that are {marked_day_class} days.
How many marked dates are on {marked_day_class_phrase}?
What is the number of marked {marked_day_class} dates?
Count only the marked dates that fall on {marked_day_class_phrase}.
workday_after_offset_date: Workdays are Monday through Friday; skip Saturday and Sunday. Starting from the marked reference date, what date is {workday_offset} workdays after it?
Workdays are Monday through Friday; skip Saturday and Sunday. Move forward {workday_offset} workdays from the marked reference date. What date do you reach?
Workdays are Monday through Friday; skip Saturday and Sunday. What date number is reached {workday_offset} workdays after the marked reference date?
Workdays are Monday through Friday; skip Saturday and Sunday. Which date is {workday_offset} workdays after the marked reference date?
Workdays are Monday through Friday; skip Saturday and Sunday. From the marked date, go {workday_offset} workdays later. What date number is that?
workday_before_offset_date: Workdays are Monday through Friday; skip Saturday and Sunday. Starting from the marked reference date, what date is {workday_offset} workdays before it?
Workdays are Monday through Friday; skip Saturday and Sunday. Move backward {workday_offset} workdays from the marked reference date. What date do you reach?
Workdays are Monday through Friday; skip Saturday and Sunday. What date number is reached {workday_offset} workdays before the marked reference date?
Workdays are Monday through Friday; skip Saturday and Sunday. Which date is {workday_offset} workdays before the marked reference date?
Workdays are Monday through Friday; skip Saturday and Sunday. From the marked date, go {workday_offset} workdays earlier. What date number is that?
weekday_range_count: The two marked dates define an inclusive range. How many Monday-through-Friday dates are in that range?
Count the weekday dates from the earlier marked date through the later marked date, including both marked dates.
Between the two marked boundary dates, inclusive, how many dates fall on Monday through Friday?
Using the two marked dates as inclusive endpoints, count the dates that are weekdays.
How many dates in the marked inclusive range are Monday-through-Friday dates?
weekend_range_count: The two marked dates define an inclusive range. How many Saturday-or-Sunday dates are in that range?
Count the weekend dates from the earlier marked date through the later marked date, including both marked dates.
Between the two marked boundary dates, inclusive, how many dates fall on Saturday or Sunday?
Using the two marked dates as inclusive endpoints, count the dates that are weekend days.
How many dates in the marked inclusive range are Saturday-or-Sunday dates?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:weekday_occurrence_date.object_description: one month-view calendar with weekday headers and date cells
query:weekday_occurrence_date.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer date number
query:weekday_occurrence_date.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates around the target date cell

query:date_weekday_label.object_description: one month-view calendar with weekday headers and date cells
query:date_weekday_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible three-letter weekday header label above the queried date, one of Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat, or Sun
query:date_weekday_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates around the queried date cell

query:marked_day_class_count.object_description: one month-view calendar with weekday headers, date cells, and several marked dates
query:marked_day_class_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of marked dates in the requested day class
query:marked_day_class_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around all matching marked date cells; use [] if none match

query:workday_after_offset_date.object_description: one month-view calendar with weekday headers, date cells, and one marked reference date
query:workday_after_offset_date.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer date number reached after moving the requested number of workdays from the marked date
query:workday_after_offset_date.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "reference_date" and "target_date", each mapped to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] box of that date cell

query:workday_before_offset_date.object_description: one month-view calendar with weekday headers, date cells, and one marked reference date
query:workday_before_offset_date.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer date number reached before moving the requested number of workdays from the marked date
query:workday_before_offset_date.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "reference_date" and "target_date", each mapped to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] box of that date cell

query:weekday_range_count.object_description: one month-view calendar with weekday headers, date cells, and two marked boundary dates
query:weekday_range_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of weekday dates in the inclusive marked range
query:weekday_range_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around all counted weekday date cells

query:weekend_range_count.object_description: one month-view calendar with weekday headers, date cells, and two marked boundary dates
query:weekend_range_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of weekend dates in the inclusive marked range
query:weekend_range_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around all counted weekend date cells
